# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        text(name: 'ARTIFACT_URLS', defaultValue: 'https://example.com/builds/my-app-1.0.zip\nhttps://example.com/builds/config.json', description: 'URLs of artifacts to download (one per line). Supports HTTP/HTTPS. For S3/Artifactory, ensure agent has respective CLIs and permissions.')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_PATH', defaultValue: '/opt/my-app', description: 'Remote path on production servers where artifacts will be deployed.')
        text(name: 'PRODUCTION_HOSTS', defaultValue: 'prod-server-01.example.com\nprod-server-02.example.
